name: @latentminds/pi-quotas
description_en: Quota monitoring for Pi. Shows remaining usage and rate limits for Anthropic, OpenAI Codex, GitHub Copilot, OpenRouter, and Synthetic — directly in your Pi session.
description_zh: Pi 的配额监控。在您的 Pi 会话中直接显示 Anthropic、OpenAI Codex、GitHub Copilot、OpenRouter 和 Synthetic 的剩余使用量和速率限制。
